Notice Of Joinder In Motions To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Ccp 1280 Et Seq And Stay Of Action
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew Martin, Esq. of Holman and Martin, T:415.755.5599, for defendants and moving party Hanson, Thompson & Investco;
Val D. Hornstein, Esq. of Hornstein Law Offices, T:415.454.1490, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No appearance for joining defendant Epsha.

RULING: DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER EPSHA's Joinder In Motion To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To CCP 1280 Et Seq And Stay Of Action is denied. (One order signed for both motions.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay This Action
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew Martin, Esq. of Holman and Martin, T:415.755.5599, for defendants and moving party;
Val D. Hornstein, Esq. of Hornstein Law Offices, T:415.454.1490, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, DEFENDANTS STEVEN THOMPSON, DOUGLAS HANSON and INVESTCO MANAGEMENT & DEVELOPMENT LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay This Action is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (See order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
